issues: Code imports fetch_prices from crazy.adapters.price_only - correct adapter import.
Code uses columns 'high', 'low', 'close', 'volume' from fetch_prices output - violates adapter contract which only returns 'date' and 'value'.
Signal logic attempts to compute daily range and volume but adapter output does not provide required columns, so signal logic does not follow spec intent.
Signal logic partially implements entry and exit conditions but on incorrect data columns, thus failing spec requirements.
Position sizing uses 5% allocation per signal and max exposure is not explicitly enforced but 5% per signal with single ticker is acceptable.
Signal names RISK_ON/RISK_OFF/HOLD are acceptable as per instructions.
Overall, failure due to adapter output columns mismatch and incorrect signal logic implementation.
